title: Create Hand Crafting - 1.18.2 - 1.20.1
description:
Completely new system item creeation in Create Mod.
Produce items with Manual Hand Aplication and Recipe Sequence
body:
====================================================================

> #### "HardRock Tools & Materials" add-on is required for this mod to work completely
> https://modrinth.com/mod/hardrock-tools-materials

====================================================================

![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uzYiQqaL/images/d7369662759710480719d7ee8365339c25cc02be.png)

============================================================================

- Most of the recipes have been modified and work on the item manual application principle.
- This does not mean that the recipes are easier, just produced in a different way
- It is a more visual and manual way of creating all items for the Create mod.
- Works with the Create mod itself and does not conflict with other mods.
- Replaces existing Create recipes by bypassing the crafting table
- and items are produced by adding individual parts until the final item is created

============================================================================


# NEW ITEMS AND COMPONENTS
![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uzYiQqaL/images/ce6990d006993894ffa10a6a11e482655673ecc4.png)

# NEW SYSTEM HAND CRAFTING

![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uzYiQqaL/images/9b7f9ff153b05298e925f22db2e0db7d97542581.png)

![hmm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uzYiQqaL/images/5997bc60ad4275a4d4939d58d47bbc512f84ad79.png)
